title.zh: 沿时间交换心灵的编年史守藏者
title.en: The Archivists Who Exchange Minds Across Time

summary.zh: 通过意识置换迁徙于不同时代的文明，囚禁被交换者并抄录其时代知识，以建立跨越亿年的总档案。
summary.en: A civilization migrating by mind exchange across ages, compiling an archive from captives temporarily displaced into alien bodies.

description.zh:
伊斯之伟大种族没有依靠飞船穿越宇宙，而是让心灵跨越时间，与目标时代的智慧生命交换身体。他们曾占据地球史前的圆锥形生物，居住在澳大利亚沙漠下的巨城。被换来的现代人会在陌生巨体中苏醒，获准阅读档案、在监管下行走，同时被要求写下自己时代的语言、政治和知识；交换结束后，记忆通常会被封锁，只以梦魇和错位感渗回。

《超越时间之影》将他们描写成冷峻却不嗜虐的守藏者。他们收集过去与未来，因为已经知道自身文明将遭到灭顶，也已选定下一种可供集体迁入的身体。这里的永生没有灵魂升华，只有一次规模宏大的撤离计划。伟大种族的图书馆因此既像人类梦想的总知识库，也像一座无人真正自愿进入的帝国博物馆：每一份珍贵记录背后，都站着一个被借走人生的人。
description.en:
The Great Race of Yith does not require spacecraft to cross the universe. Its minds travel through time and exchange bodies with intelligent beings in a chosen age. The race once occupied conical organisms on prehistoric Earth and built a vast city beneath the Australian desert. A displaced modern human awakens inside an alien body, receives supervised access to archives, and is required to record the languages, politics, and knowledge of the captive’s own period. When the exchange is reversed, memory is usually blocked, leaking back only through nightmares and temporal dislocation.

“The Shadow Out of Time” portrays these archivists as severe but not delighting in cruelty. They gather past and future because they already know their civilization will be destroyed and have selected another species into which their collective will escape. Immortality here is not spiritual ascent but evacuation on an immense scale. Their library resembles both humanity’s dream of total knowledge and an imperial museum no contributor freely entered. Behind every invaluable record stands someone whose life and body were temporarily requisitioned.

value.zh: 大型圆锥生物，仅是意识的暂居之壳
value.en: Large conical organisms, temporary vessels for migrating minds

sources.zh: H. P. 洛夫克拉夫特《超越时间之影》
sources.en: H. P. Lovecraft, “The Shadow Out of Time”

sources.zh: S. T. 乔希、David E. Schultz《H. P. Lovecraft Encyclopedia》
sources.en: S. T. Joshi and David E. Schultz, An H. P. Lovecraft Encyclopedia
